intake.content:
# Mission Intake Analysis: PDF Template Design

## Mission Classification
**Studio:** Creative (with Technical Constraints)  
**Wave:** 1/2 (Foundation)  
**Criticality:** High - Core revenue feature (proposal generation)

---

## Objectives

### Primary Objective
Design and build production-ready HTML/CSS PDF templates for automated proposal generation that render flawlessly in headless Chrome/Puppeteer, supporting dynamic data injection for the SaaS conversion of thelab.lat proposal system.

### Success Criteria
- [ ] Templates render identically in Puppeteer vs. design mockups
- [ ] Dynamic data injection points clearly documented
- [ ] Print-perfect layouts (A4/Letter) with proper page breaks
- [ ] Asset optimization <500KB total per template
- [ ] Base64-ready assets for standalone PDF generation

---

## Scope Definition

### In Scope
| Component | Requirements |
|-----------|-------------|
| **Cover Page** | Dynamic client name, project title, date, proposal ID, branded hero sec

plan.content:
# Execution Plan: PDF Template Design

## Mission Scope Definition

**Objective:** Build a production-grade PDF generation system with HTML/CSS templates that render consistently in headless Chrome/Puppeteer for automated SaaS proposal generation.

**Constraints:**
- Target: Headless Chrome/Puppeteer (Chromium engine)
- Output: Print-ready PDF (A4/Letter)
- Data: Dynamic injection via template engine
- Scale: Multi-tenant SaaS (customizable per client)

---

## Technical Architecture

### Template System Design
```
/templates
├── base/                 # Layout foundations
│   ├── print-reset.css   # Normalize for PDF rendering
│   ├── typography.css    # Font stacks with fallbacks
│   └── utilities.css     # Page break helpers
├── components/           # Reusable proposal sections
│   ├── header.html
│   ├── cover-page.html
│   ├── pricing-table.html
│   ├── scope-section.html
│   └── signature-block.html
└── themes/               # Client-customizable variants
    ├── default/
    ├──
